title: Battle of Druckenwell (Yuuzhan Vong War)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Druckenwell}} {{Battle |prev=*[[Battle of Gyndine]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' *[[Battle of Fondor]] *Invasion of the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] **[[Battle of Nal Hutta]] **[[Battle of Ylesia (26 ABY)|Battle of Ylesia]]''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *[[Battle of the Nexus Ortai system|Attack of the Nexus Ortai system]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Battle of Kalarba]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |conc=*Conquest of the Hutt Space *[[Battle of Falleen (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Falleen]] |next=*[[Battle of Rodia (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Rodia]] *[[Evacuation of Kubindi]] *[[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] |image=[[File:DruckenwellYVW-TEA.jpg]] |name=Battle of Druckenwell |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] (c. 61:3)''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the start of [[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point|''Balance Point'']] ten months after the [[Destruction of Sernpidal]], which occurs in 60.5 per ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. |place=[[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] |result=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] victory |side1=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side2=Yuuzhan Vong |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2=[[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]]{{GamerCite|8|Hive of the Infidel}} |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=The population turned out under violent oppression }} {{Quote|I guess Druckenwell's gone, too?''"
"''And Falleen. They've reached Rodia. It's the heavy end of the hammer, pounding and pounding.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|}} A '''battle''' was fought during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] on [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]]. During their campaign to cut off the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]], Druckenwell was among the conquered [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] including [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]], [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]] and [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]]. While a certain percentage of the population was evacuated aboard [[Starship/Legends|starships]], those left behind were tasked with dismantling Druckenwell's cities and using arable land to grow Yuuzhan Vong [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]]. ==History== ===Invasion=== {{Quote|As you see, our hyperspace probes are returning limited information. Kalarba, Druckenwell, and Falleen are lost. Even if we could retain Rodia, the Corellian Run is cut.|[[Ayddar Nylykerka]]|}} [[File:Druckenwell_FF19.jpg|left|thumb|Druckenwell's crowded cities were divided by wide oceans, and almost all of the planet's available land was developed]] In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] race of invaders, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], launched a massive [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest campaign]] directed against all worlds of the [[Galactic community]].''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' [[26 ABY/Legends|Less than a year later]],{{GamerCite|8|I, Yuuzhan Vong}} in an attempt to cut off the Rimward leg of the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]], a vital [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]], the Yuuzhan Vong initiated a blitz across the [[Doldur sector/Legends|Doldur sector]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and [[Battle of Kalarba|devastated]] [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]]. The isolated worlds along the Corellian Run toward the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] went on full alert as the Yuuzhan Vong captured them one after another. [[Druckenwell]] was an industrialized, overpopulated urban world – a symbol of everything the Yuuzhan Vong found abominable about the civilizations inhabiting their «promised» worlds. The massive corporations that had served as the true authority on the planet mounted no resistance, which was fortunate; faced with opposition, the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|invasion fleet]] might have cleansed the world of all life and technology. Instead, the population shifted its efforts from toiling for corporate profits to laboring for the greater glory of the Yuuzhan Vong. Their first two assignments were to prepare proper fields for [[Foodstuff/Legends|food production]] and other resources''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and to dismantle the congested metropolises in which they had once lived. While the planets Druckenwell and [[Battle of Falleen (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Falleen]] were captured by the invaders, the planet [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] was [[Battle of Rodia (Yuuzhan Vong War)|placed]] in a vulnerable position. ===Aftermath=== {{Quote|There is no failure, only glorious success or a glorious death.|Commander [[Malik Carr]], to Yuuzhan Vong commandos|}} [[File:Ka-Tu-Un.jpg|right|thumb|300px|Yuuzhan Vong commandos are trying to capture the «Jedi»]] Prisoners captured in the battle for the planet Druckenwell revealed that there might have been a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] hiding aboard the converted [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Chilastra]]'', which was part of the [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] fleet attempting to leave the [[Druckenwell system/Legends|Druckenwell system]]. The Yuuzhan Vong were intensely curious about the Jedi, whom they regarded as a threat to their otherwise inevitable conquest. Previous attempts to capture or convert Jedi had failed, and this time the Yuuzhan Vong were determined not to miss a new opportunity. For this mission, Commander [[Malik Carr]] personally assembled a group of elite commandos and ordered them to capture the suspected Jedi. Using a captured [[New Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], the commandos boarded the refugee freighter ''Chilastra'', which was hiding among the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of the Druckenwell system. Once aboard – by any means necessary – they were to capture the possible Jedi known as [[Ka-Tu-Un]] and return him to the Yuuzhan Vong fleet in orbit over Druckenwell. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1stm}} *{{GamerCite|8|Hive of the Infidel}} {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de Druckenwell (Guerra Yuuzhan Vong) }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Druckenwell (Yuuzhan Vong War), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Druckenwell]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]]
